raw.message: Der King des Monats® im April: der Crispy Chicken mit Big King® Sauce.

hook.summary: Dynamic reveal of the 'King of the Month' meal deal.
hook.visual_action: A yellow wave graphic sweeps down to frame a Crispy Chicken BKS meal while promotional badges pop onto the screen.
hook.text_overlay: Crispy Chicken BKS, KING DES MONATS, 5.99 €

scene_flow: Initial display of the Crispy Chicken BKS meal on a plain cream background.
A yellow graphic transition slides in from the top, introducing the 'King des Monats' branding.
Promotional badges for the special sauce and the 5.99 Euro price point pop into the frame with rhythmic sound effects.
The final offer layout remains static with upbeat music and legal disclaimers visible at the bottom.
audience_proxy: Value-conscious fast food consumers in Germany looking for affordable chicken meal deals.
